1: In thy faithfulness answer me, and and in thy righteousness.
2: For in thy sight shall no man living be justified.
3: He hath made me to dwell in darkness, as those that have been long dead.
4: My heart within me is desolate.
5: I muse on the work of thy hands.
6: My soul thirsteth thirsteth after thee, as a thirsty land. Selah. Selah.
7: Hide not thy face from me, lest I be like unto them that go down into the pit.
8: Cause me to know the way wherein I should walk; For I lift up my soul unto thee.
9: I flee unto thee to hide me.
10: Thy spirit is is good; lead me into the land of uprightness.
11: For thy righteousness' sake bring my soul out of trouble.
12: And destroy all them that afflict my soul: For I am am thy servant.
